name: metering
description: The pluggable budget and usage layer: estimate(step) -> cost admission before each step, actual(result) -> cost accounting after, endpoint fidelity tiers for how cost is measured, a reactive 429-defer floor beneath all of them, and a pluggable cost unit.

requirements.title: Estimate and actual hooks
requirements.description: A Meter interface with two hooks the executor calls around every step: estimate(step) -> cost before launch (admission: reject or defer when the budget would be exceeded) and actual(result) -> cost after completion (accounting against the run budget). The default meter is a no-op; users plug implementations per endpoint class.

requirements.title: Endpoint fidelity tiers
requirements.description: Cost measurement fidelity is declared per endpoint class: exact (local/OSS endpoints — tokenizer-exact hard-upper-bound admission assuming no cache reuse, fresh input, max output), reported (vendor usage blocks read from responses), and probe (subscription endpoints with no usage API — best-effort user-supplied probes, explicitly user policy and never a faber default).

requirements.title: Reactive 429 defer
requirements.description: The floor under every tier: when a step fails with a rate-limit signal carrying a reset time, the executor defers the step until the reset epoch rather than failing the run. Works with zero configuration and no estimation.

requirements.title: Pluggable cost unit
requirements.description: The cost type is an opaque unit-tagged quantity (tokens, currency, GPU-seconds) compared and summed only within the same unit; budgets are declared in a unit and only meters reporting that unit participate in admission against them.

requirements.title: Deferred: run cost aggregation
requirements.description: Backlog (design edge case 9): roll per-step actuals into run-level and generate-item-level totals with a reporting surface (run summary, machine-readable export). First pass records per-step actuals in the journal without aggregation.

components.name: MeterInterface
components.description: The Meter interface, the unit-tagged Cost type, the Budget declaration, and the admission decision vocabulary (admit, defer(until), reject). Owns the deferred aggregation seam via the journal's per-step actual records.

components.name: EndpointTiers
components.description: The fidelity-tier contracts and reference implementations: exact (tokenizer upper bound), reported (usage-block reader), probe (opaque user command). Tier selection is config per endpoint class.

components.name: RateLimitDefer
components.description: Detects rate-limit signals in step failures, extracts the reset time, and converts the failure into a defer(until) decision for the scheduler. Independent of any meter configuration.

data_flows.name: Admission flow
data_flows.description: Ready step -> estimate(step) via the endpoint's tier -> admission decision (admit / defer(until) / reject) -> step runs -> actual(result) accounting -> budget state; rate-limit failures re-enter as defer(until reset).
